class.name: soccer_control/ResidualRLController
class.description: Reads the MPC reference (q*, qd*) and the measured joint state, evaluates a bounded RL residual policy (ONNX, exported from Isaac Lab), and writes q_target = q* + clamp(Δq) plus a feed-forward effort. Because the residual is hard-clamped a misbehaving policy can never destabilize the joint.
